compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs to reflect sprint gap detection and routing
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section and relevant documentation to reflect the 4 detection checkpoints, CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal, REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats, and non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED behavior added by epic 9d3e-957d.

## Implementation
1. Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document:
   - Sprint drift detection at entry (sprint-drift-check.sh)
   - CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN confidence signal (contract: confidence-signal.md)
   - Story validation failure remediation routing
   - Out-of-scope review feedback routing (sprint-review-scope-check.sh)
   - REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED observability format (contract: replan-observability.md)
   - Non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED brainstorm escalation
2. Update CLAUDE.md to reference the new scripts:
   - plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh
   - plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-review-scope-check.sh
3. Update CLAUDE.md to reference the new contracts:
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-signal.md
   - plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md

## test-exempt: no conditional logic
Documentation-only changes. No executable behavior. Any test would be a change-detector asserting string presence in CLAUDE.md.

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents all 4 detection checkpoints (drift, failure, validation, review)
  Verify: grep -c 'drift\|failure\|validation\|review' CLAUDE.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal
  Verify: grep -q 'CONFIDENT.*UNCERTAIN\|confidence.*signal' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling
  Verify: grep -q 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references new scripts
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-drift-check\|sprint-review-scope-check' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Decision engine gate evaluation complete. Gate 1 (No-Op): FAIL — behavioral changes to sprint orchestrator affect agent-facing rules. Gate 2 (User Impact): FAIL — no end-user UI/workflow changes. Gate 3 (Architectural): PASS — new sprint self-healing checkpoints, two new scripts, two new contracts constitute architectural additions. Gate 4 (Constraint): PASS — new script names and contract paths are constraints agents must reference. Actions: (1) CLAUDE.md suggested-change report for new sprint gap detection content; (2) Living Reference update for system-landscape.md; (3) ADR creation for sprint gap detection architecture.
comments.author: Main

Frontmatter synced to f7daa80d. Tier 4 (ADR) created: docs/adr/0002-sprint-gap-detection-and-routing.md.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: CLAUDE.md suggested-change report emitted (read-only guard). Content covers: (1) sprint-drift-check.sh drift detection, (2) CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal with confidence-signal.md contract ref, (3) validation failure routing, (4) out-of-scope review routing with sprint-review-scope-check.sh, (5) REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED with replan-observability.md contract ref, (6) INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED non-interactive handling. Orchestrator/user must apply to CLAUDE.md manually.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Acceptance criteria verified against written files. system-landscape.md passes all 5 pattern checks (drift/failure/validation/review count=8, CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN PASS, REPLAN_TRIGGER PASS, REPLAN_RESOLVED PASS, INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED PASS, script refs PASS). ADR 0002 created. CLAUDE.md pending manual application of suggested-change report.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: No Breakout Heuristic triggered. Sprint Self-Healing Loop section in system-landscape.md is well under 1500 tokens and uses no 3rd-level nested headers. Tier 2 (user-facing docs) not applicable — epic adds no end-user workflow changes. llms.txt not updated — no new navigation entry required for internal sprint orchestrator changes.
